sections.title: How to Perform the Aarti
sections.content: Detailed instructions on performing the aarti with proper procedure.
steps: Light the diya with ghee or oil
Place flowers and prasad before the deity
Ring the bell while singing the aarti
Move the diya in circular motion
Conclude with pranam and distribution of prasad
sections.bestTime: Evening during sunset or after puja
